Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are a lot of complex-looking[n]technical books lined up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Upon closer inspection, there's a[n]book called 100 Best Puns mixed[n]in with the complex books...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are a lot of complex-looking[n]technical books lined up...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't look like anyone has[n]touched them in a while...[n]{f 1 1}
